nasb.text: Taking the blind man by the hand, He brought him out of the village; and after spitting on his eyes and laying His hands on him, He asked him, “Do you see anything?”

esv.text: And he took the blind man by the hand and led him out of the village, and when he had spit on his eyes and laid his hands on him, he asked him, “Do you see anything?”

cnv.text: 耶穌拉著他的手，領他到村外，吐唾沫在他的眼睛上，又用雙手按在他的身上，問他：“你看見甚麼沒有？”

ccb.text: 耶稣拉着瞎子的手带他走到村外，吐唾沫在他的眼睛上，并把手按在他身上，问他：“你看见什么了？”

csbs.text: 耶稣牵着瞎眼之人的手，领他到村子外面，吐唾沫在他的眼睛上，按手在他身上，问他：“你是否看见什么？”
